Video.summary: We take a stock 305 Chevy and a 302 Ford and find out dollar for horsepower who comes out on top.
Video.title: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Image.alt: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Video.summary: 302 vs 305! Round 2 of the classic debate. Budget head swap dyno test. Which 90's head rules?
Video.title: 302 vs. 305 Round 2

Video.summary: 302 SBF vs. 305 SBC battle: We're increasing compression on both, comparing gains head-to-head!
Video.title: 302 vs 305 Pt 3 High Compression Showdown

Video.summary: We wrap up the assembly of our Bronco.
Video.title: ’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning

Image.alt: ’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning
’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning
’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning

Video.summary: From freeway to farmyard, this rugged straight six was everywhere! It’s the subject of our latest build.
Video.title: Ford 300 Inline Six

Video.summary: Even after 45 years, our antique Ford engine still runs.
Video.title: A Fine Inline Six

Video.summary: The six-cylinder Ford’s numbers keep climbing as we give it major cam, piston, and cylinder head upgrades.
Video.title: Ford’s Big Buzzin’ Half Dozen

Video.summary: Our famous Ford 300 comes home to the Engine Power shop for even BIGGER POWER upgrades.
Video.title: Ultimate Ford 300 Turbo Build - Part 1

Video.summary: Our Turbo Ford 300 dream build continues, assembling for big dyno power!
Video.title: Ultimate Ford 300 Turbo Build - Part 2

Video.summary: Our Turbo Ford 300 returns for dyno showdown: naturally aspirated vs. boosted!
Video.title: Ultimate Ford 300 Turbo Build - Part 3

Video.summary: We're putting together a high-compression 440ci road race engine for Carcass' 1972 Camaro race car!
Video.title: 440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part I

Image.alt: 440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part I
440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part I
440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part I

Video.summary: We finish the assembly of our 440 with a conventional SBC bottom end and LS induction.
Video.title: 440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part II

Image.alt: 440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part II
440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part II
440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part II

Video.summary: We introduce our Low-Fi S-10 project and look at the history of the Mini Truck Slam world.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project
Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project
Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project

Video.summary: We tear into our Low-Fi S-10 project and the rear suspension is our focus.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: We Lay Frame

Video.summary: Our Chevy Low-Fi S-10 project continues and today is front suspension teardown and upgrades
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension
Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension
Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension

Video.summary: We send our S-10 out to an expert who will create and install a custom audio system and interior.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior
Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior
Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior

Video.summary: We are on the home stretch of our ’95 Chevy S-10 Mini Slam Project.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together
Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together
Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together

Video.summary: We found a 1977 Granada with a great body, but several mechanical issues, and get it running right!
Video.title: Fatigued Ford

Video.summary: We wanted to build a ride that looks like a Sunday driver…until you step on the throttle!
Video.title: Sleeper Granada Part 2

Video.summary: Our 1977 Ford Granada has achieved sleeper status!
Video.title: Sleeper Granada Part 3

Video.summary: Our 1977 Ford Granada faces its toughest test during a full-throttle day at the drag strip.
Video.title: The Sleeper Awakens

Video.summary: Assembly on the 4.3L engine begins with a solid bottom end.
Video.title: 4.3L Chevy V6 Bottom End Build

Video.summary: The 4.3L engine shows what it can do in the dyno cell!
Video.title: 4.3L Chevy V6 on the Dyno

Video.summary: We crank up the power on our old-school GM 4.3L V6 with some turbocharged forced induction.
Video.title: Turbocharging the GM 4.3L V6

Video.summary: We do something never done before: build two engines to run on the dyno at the SAME TIME!
Video.title: Two Engines, One Big Plan

Video.summary: We connect TWO 496 Big Block Chevy engines to the dyno to find out exactly how much power they make.
Video.title: Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno

Image.alt: Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno
Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno
Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno

Video.summary: We seek more power from our twin-engine setup by reconfiguring the exhaust and phasing the engines.
Video.title: More Double Dyno Tech

Video.summary: We put custom touches on our 496ci Stroker Big Block and get it ready for the street rod life!
Video.title: 496ci Stroker Big Block Chevy

Video.summary: Today we finish the final assembly of our 1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco with the installation of the interior.
Video.title: 1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll

Image.alt: 1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll
1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll
1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll

Video.summary: The guys work hard to finish their 1974 build under the hood, under the frame, and under the top.
Video.title: Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas

Image.alt: Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas
Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas
Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas

Video.summary: The guys show off the completed 1974 Bronco on the floor at SEMA.
Video.title: Beach Cruiser Bronco Finale

Video.summary: In the series launch we take a 1991 Chevy Suburban and transform it into ‘Project Unbreakable.’
Video.title: Project Unbreakable

Video.summary: Our GMC “Unbreakable” Suburban gets its new suspension.
Video.title: Suburban Suspension

Video.summary: Our “Unbreakable” Suburban gets its engine and transmission.
Video.title: Unbreakable Nears The Finish

Video.summary: Our Unbreakable Chevy Suburban makes its final preparations for payoff.
Video.title: Unbreakable Readies For The Mountain

Video.summary: The guys put Project Unbreakable, our ’91 Chevy Suburban, to the test at Adventure Off Road Park!
Video.title: The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road

Image.alt: The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road
The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road
The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road

Video.summary: Come along as we take a massive ‘91 GMC Suburban square body and turn it into a lifted off-road beast.
Video.title: An Unbreakable Suburban Transformation

Video.summary: With new wheels and tires and steering upgrade, the guys take their Chevy Suburban for a drive!
Video.title: Unbreakable Suburban Comes To Life

Video.summary: We build the foundation of a stroker LS that would be a PERFECT fit for a hot rod!
Video.title: Pro LS Bottom End Build

Video.summary: We complete our stroker LS powerplant and put it to the ultimate performance test in the dyno cell!
Video.title: Pro LS on the Dyno

Video.summary: Today, we're starting a project to build an awesome 1937 Ford!
Video.title: Starting Project Hot Rod Truck

Video.summary: Today, Project Hot Rod Truck gets it's drivetrain in the form of a hot small block Ford V8.
Video.title: A Train for Project HRT

Video.summary: With the driveline in place, now it's time to work on the body.
Video.title: Body Work for Project HRT

Video.summary: First our frame will be turned into a work of art.
Video.title: Project HRT Part 4

Video.summary: Today we're painting Project HRT!
Video.title: Project HRT Part 5

Video.summary: We'll get you up caught up on all the work we've done to Project HRT.
Video.title: HRT & Ron Covell Metal Shaping Lesson

Image.alt: HRT & Ron Covell Metal Shaping Lesson
HRT & Ron Covell Metal Shaping Lesson
HRT & Ron Covell Metal Shaping Lesson

Video.summary: Pat and Frankie from Engine Power rescue an abandoned 1977 Ford Granada and turn it into a spicy sleeper.
Video.title: Spicy Granada

Video.summary: As part of the Motorsports Team, students at UNOH build high-performance dirt race cars.
Video.title: From Classroom to Circle Track

Video.summary: This Small Block Ford receives big power upgrades.
Video.title: 410ci Stroker Windsor

Video.summary: We’re expecting great numbers in the dyno cell for the 410ci Small Block Ford.
Video.title: Stroker Windsor Dyno Test

Video.summary: We reinforce our Slant Six with a fully-forged rotating assembly.
Video.title: High Tech Slant Six

Video.summary: We give our Slant Six a huge induction upgrade, a custom EFI system, and a turbocharger.
Video.title: High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted

Image.alt: High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted
High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted
High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted
